jobs.prompt: Editorial illustration on warm cream parchment background: an elegant abstract binary tree of plain empty circles connected by smooth ink branches, perfectly symmetric levels fading softly toward the bottom; a gently glowing path of terracotta circles descends from the root to one deep node, always branching left or right, suggesting a search descending the tree. All nodes are empty plain circles. Absolutely no text, no letters, no digits, no numerals, no labels inside or near the circles. Deep ink outlines, dusty blue and terracotta accents, generous negative space, quiet premium academic atmosphere.
